OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
David Mendez, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Jayesh N. Patel.
Devin Brennan, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: Steve Collins.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for entry of judgment", which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of Jan. 4, 2010 is vacated.
